summary: Backend testing after refactoring. Verified SMS service (rate limiting 3/hr, code expiration 5min), Email mock storage in sent_emails collection, phone verification flow, and existing endpoints (categories, businesses, workers) still working. All 35 tests pass.

frontend_issues.notes: Backend only testing - frontend not tested this iteration

passed_tests: SMS send-code returns dev_code in development mode ✓
SMS rate limiting works (429 after 3 requests/hour) ✓
Phone verification flow with correct code ✓
Phone verification rejects wrong code with 400 ✓
SMS code structure: 6 digits, stored with expiration (5 min) ✓
Email mock storage in sent_emails collection ✓
critical_code_review_comments: New modular structure (core/, models/, services/, utils/) working correctly
SMS service properly implements rate limiting (3/hr) and code expiration (5 min)
Email service mocks emails in development and stores in sent_emails collection
Worker notification logic properly integrated when booking is confirmed (via Stripe webhook)
Note: Worker notifications only trigger when booking is confirmed via webhook - no test bookings confirmed

seed_data_verification.phone_codes: 14 phone codes in database with proper expiration times
seed_data_verification.sent_emails: 1 test email stored (verified email mock storage works)

mocked_api_note.SMS (Twilio): MOCKED in development - codes logged to console and stored in phone_codes collection
mocked_api_note.Email (Resend): MOCKED in development - emails logged to console and stored in sent_emails collection

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring completed and verified. New modular structure: core/config.py (env vars), core/database.py (MongoDB connection), services/sms.py (Twilio with rate limiting), services/email.py (Resend with mock storage), services/notifications.py (internal notifications), models/enums.py (status enums). Main server.py unchanged but imports new services. SMS: max 3 requests/hour per phone, codes expire in 5 minutes, dev mode returns code in response. Email: stored in sent_emails collection, admin can view at /api/admin/emails (requires 2FA). Worker notifications: sent when booking confirmed via Stripe webhook (email + internal notification).

verification_summary.sms_code_expiration: VERIFIED - expires_at field set to 5 minutes from creation
verification_summary.email_mock_storage: VERIFIED - emails stored in sent_emails collection
verification_summary.worker_notifications: CODE REVIEWED - triggers on booking confirmation via webhook, not tested end-to-end (no confirmed bookings)
